title: | Improved Crafting Table |
description: A new look for the old crafting table.
body:
# |IMPROVED CRAFTING TABLE|
## **Introduction:**

New looks for the old crafting table for both Vanilla (V1) and modern modding style (V2). From my perspective, the crafting table looks out of place next to the other functional blocks, maybe because to keep the symbolism, they haven't changed it for many years, so I gave it a new look, more consistent and outstanding with the current style.

## **Description:**

**-Introduce 2 different versions of the Crafting Table to choose from (V1 and V2).

**-Now have 4 different faces.**

**-Add some small details

**-New texture for the bottom.**

## **Usage:**

## **Allowed:**

-You're allowed to use this in personal or public Modpack but please make sure to credit me or leave the link to the download site.

-Feel free to make a video about it or include it, be grateful if there is credit.

## **Not Allowed:**

-You cannot change or take any assets from the pack without permission.

-Don't claim at your creation.

**!Please note that older versions are supported, ignore the warning!**
